description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci build that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to the master branch. The workflow should have two jobs, ubuntu-cmake and fedora-cmake, both running on ubuntu-latest. The ubuntu-cmake job should install dependencies, checkout the code, and run make, make check, and make tutorial. The fedora-cmake job should run in a fedora:latest container, checkout the code, verify the OS, install dependencies, and then run make, make check, and make tutorial.
